## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 🧬 New framework adapter

- [ ] 🧪 Tests only

## Testing

- [ ] Added unit tests covering the new behavior
- [ ] Existing tests still pass locally (`pytest sdk-python/tests/`)
- [ ] If this touches an adapter, I exercised it end-to-end with a real
      LLM call against the published SDK

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project style (`ruff` clean)
- [ ] Updated [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated [README.md](../README.md) if user-facing surface changed
- [ ] Added entry to `bench/` if this adds a benchmark
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.internal/` content in the diff
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
